Bots._doc: Routes is a JSON array of { AgentName, AppId } injected by bicep as Bots__Routes. Used by JWT middleware (route-bound aud check) and by FicServiceClientCredentialsFactory (allow-list of valid app ids).

TeamsApp._doc: Single shared backend app reg. BackendSecret is the only stored secret in the system (used for OBO from /admin and from the Bot Service OAuth Connection). Per-bot outbound auth is secretless via FIC.

AdminChatAuth._doc: AAD bearer auth on /admin so the UAMI no longer needs Foundry RBAC. ClientId+Secret default to TeamsApp:BackendAppId/BackendSecret if unset.
